message:
🛟BM Lifeguard 🛟

Islandwide locations available! No minimum hours required!

Up to $16/hr

Job Scope
🔹Enforce swimming pool rules and regulations, remind pool users on water safety, and advise on appropriate supervision of patrons.
🔹Maintain constant vigilance and remain stationed at an assigned position with a clear and unobstructed view of the designated area of coverage.
🔹Identify unsafe behaviour, hazardous conditions, or water quality issues, and take prompt action to mitigate risks in accordance with SOPs.
🔹Respond immediately to persons in distress and perform water rescues when required.
🔹Provide Standard First Aid, CPR, and AED when required, in accordance with training and Company procedures.
🔹Activate and follow the Emergency Action Plan during incidents, including clearing of pools, crowd control, and coordination with other lifeguards and venue personnel.
🔹Communicate clearly with patrons and respond to general enquiries related to pool safety and operations.
Inform and coordinate with the Senior Lifeguard or venue-in-charge during incidents, and provide accurate information as required.
🔹Assist emergency services upon arrival by providing support such as site guidance and maintaining scene safety.

Requirement
🔹Possess a Bronze Medallion Certification.
🔹Confident working in a water environment and able to enter the water when necessary.
🔹Willing to work shift schedules, including weekends and public holidays.
🔹Responsible and punctual.
🔹Able to communicate clearly and politely when providing assistance and advice.

WhatsApp +65 9747 0988 to apply!
